Overrides.Override: 10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress
Enemies Poisoned by you have 10% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Chaos Limited to 1 Runegraft of Rotblood
Spells deal added Chaos Damage equal to 2% of your maximum Life Spells Cost +8% of Life Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Witchmark
5% chance to Hinder Enemies on Hit with Spells
Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp

Skill.source: Item:7:Foulborn Aegis Aurora, Champion Kite Shield

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Empyrean Sole Runic Sabatons Ward: 456 WardBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: 5ca929ef87d3b014b6e529c748f5ef31d4804bc0c077cfcbee0831954bfc1263 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-B LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 2 19% chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments Drops Brittle Ground while moving, lasting 3 seconds +83 to Ward 90% increased Ward 58% faster Restoration of Ward +124 to maximum Life +46% to Lightning Resistance {crafted}+6% chance to Suppress Spell Damage
